display.$description: iA Writer Quattro at 700 for headings and the wordmark. Georgia is the metric-compatible system fallback while the woff2 files load.

base.$description: iA Writer Quattro at 400 for body copy, navigation, and metadata. Same family as display — MOK uses one face for both.

mono.$description: iA Writer Mono for code blocks, inline code, labels, and dense metadata.
